command.command_line:
$ref = (Get-Content -Raw REFERENCE_BINARY.txt).Trim()
$cases = @(
  ,@('tests/itest')
  ,@('tests/itest','--absolute')
  ,@('tests/itest/index.svg','--absolute')
  ,@('tests/itest','--long','--no-user','--no-time','--no-filesize')
  ,@('tests/itest','-T')
  ,@('tests/itest','--icons=always')
  ,@('tests/itest','--only-dirs')
  ,@('tests/itest','--only-files')
  ,@('tests/itest','--recurse','--level','2')
  ,@('tests/itest','--tree','--level','2')
  ,@('nonexistentdir')
)
function Invoke-Capture([string]$file, [string[]]$arguments, [string]$cwd) {
  $psi = [System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo]::new()
  $psi.FileName = $file
  foreach ($a in $arguments) { [void]$psi.ArgumentList.Add($a) }
  $psi.WorkingDirectory = $cwd
  $psi.RedirectStandardOutput = $true
  $psi.RedirectStandardError = $true
  $psi.UseShellExecute = $false
  $psi.StandardOutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8
  $psi.StandardErrorEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8
  $p = [System.Diagnostics.Process]::Start($psi)
  $out = $p.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd()
  $err = $p.StandardError.ReadToEnd()
  $p.WaitForExit()
  [pscustomobject]@{ Code = $p.ExitCode; Out = $out; Err = $err }
}
$cwd = (Resolve-Path rust-reference).Path
foreach ($args in $cases) {
  $r = Invoke-Capture $ref $args $cwd
  $pyargs = @('..\executable') + $args
  $p = Invoke-Capture 'python' $pyargs $cwd
  $same = ($r.Code -eq $p.Code -and $r.Out -eq $p.Out -and $r.Err -eq $p.Err)
  $caseText = $args -join ' '
  "CASE: $caseText"
  "  ref=$($r.Code) py=$($p.Code) same=$same outLen=$($r.Out.Length)/$($p.Out.Length) errLen=$($r.Err.Length)/$($p.Err.Length)"
  if (-not $same) {
    "  REF OUT: " + (($r.Out -split "`r?`n" | Select-Object -First 5) -join ' | ')
    "  PY  OUT: " + (($p.Out -split "`r?`n" | Select-Object -First 5) -join ' | ')
    "  REF ERR: " + (($r.Err -split "`r?`n" | Select-Object -First 2) -join ' | ')
    "  PY  ERR: " + (($p.Err -split "`r?`n" | Select-Object -First 2) -join ' | ')
  }
}
